message:
chore: add .bv/ (beads viewer) to .gitignore

The beads viewer (bv) tool creates a .bv/ directory for local config
and caches when run against a project. This is machine-local state
that should not be tracked in version control.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -15,3 +15,6 @@ Thumbs.db
 
 # Lock files
 *.lock
+
+# bv (beads viewer) local config and caches
+.bv/
